name: Quick Pate with Onion-Fruit Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Walnuts or pine nuts, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------ONION-FRUIT MARMALADE---------------------------
1. In a bowl, combine liverwurst, green onion, parsley, walnuts, brandy, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, pepper and nutmeg. Refrigerate at least 1 hour.
2. In a small skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Quickly saute onion until just softened, about 5 minutes. Cover, reduce heat to low and cook for an additional 5 minutes (it shouldn't brown).
3. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine apricots, orange juice, raisins, sherry, lemon juice, lemon rind and orange rind. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; stir in marmalade preserves and additional pepper. Allow to cool.
5. Spread about one tablespoon pate on each toasted bread slice. Top with a generous spoonful of the marmalade. Garnish with minced parsley.
